stats_fallback.christened: 2019-11-09 (Hamburg, godmother Sophia Loren — her 15th MSC ship)

related.class_siblings: Meraviglia-Plus: MSC Grandiosa (2019, first-in-class), MSC Virtuosa (2021), MSC Euribia (2023). Base Meraviglia class: MSC Meraviglia (2017), MSC Bellissima (2019).
related.cirque_du_soleil: YES - Cirque du Soleil at Sea in the Carousel Lounge (Deck 7)

deployment.summer_2026: Western Mediterranean 7-night round-trips from Genoa, Civitavecchia, Barcelona, Marseille, Palma de Mallorca
deployment.winter_2026_27: Year-round Port Canaveral, Florida — Caribbean and Bahamas
deployment.notes: First MSC ship committed to year-round Central Florida. Transitioning from Med season to Port Canaveral in winter 2026-27 and staying year-round thereafter.

history.christened: 9 November 2019, Hamburg (River Elbe with Elbphilharmonie light show)
history.maiden_voyage: 10 November 2019 from Hamburg (10-night inaugural to Genoa)
history.first_to_resume: First major cruise ship to resume sailing after the 2020 industry shutdown
history.last_drydock: October-November 2024 at Palumbo Shipyard Malta (3-week technical and public-area refurbishment)
history.port_canaveral_arrival: December 2025 — first MSC ship to homeport year-round in Central Florida
